title: chrysanthemum × morifolium var. sinense
intro: Chrysanthemum × morifolium var. sinense, also known as the Chinese chrysanthemum, is a variety of the florally valued plant that has been widely cultivated for its ornamental and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum × morifolium var. sinense include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing coughs, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Chrysanthemum × morifolium var. sinense is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
